_sample.how_mode_is_detected: Use this when garments/og/<id>/ exists and garments/og/<id>.jpg does not exist.
input_files: archetypes.garment_batch_models folder with one or more model/avatar images
flow: Try every normalized garment on every model image in archetypes.garment_batch_models.
Build a grouped catalog-style reel: garment, matching results, next garment, matching results.
_sample.important_guardrail: Video is intentionally disabled for Mode 2.

vto.prompt: virtual try on. show each garment naturally fitted on the model. preserve realistic fabric, garment details, lighting, proportions, and full outfit visibility.
